root_text.an4.79:1.1: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā sāriputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an4.79:1.2: “ko nu kho, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā chedagāminī hoti?
root_text.an4.79:1.3: Ko pana, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā na yathādhippāyā hoti?
root_text.an4.79:1.4: Ko nu kho, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā yathādhippāyā hoti?
root_text.an4.79:1.5: Ko pana, bhante, hetu ko paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā parādhippāyā hotī”ti?
root_text.an4.79:2.1: “Idha, sāriputta, ekacco samaṇaṁ vā brāhmaṇaṁ vā upasaṅkamitvā pavāreti: ‘vadatu, bhante, paccayenā’ti. So yena pavāreti taṁ na deti.
root_text.an4.79:2.2: So ce tato cuto itthattaṁ āgacchati, so yaññadeva vaṇijjaṁ payojeti, sāssa hoti chedagāminī.
root_text.an4.79:3.1: Idha pana, sāriputta, ekacco samaṇaṁ vā brāhmaṇaṁ vā upasaṅkamitvā pavāreti: ‘vadatu, bhante, paccayenā’ti. So yena pavāreti taṁ na yathādhippāyaṁ deti.
root_text.an4.79:3.2: So ce tato cuto itthattaṁ āgacchati, so yaññadeva vaṇijjaṁ payojeti, sāssa na hoti yathādhippāyā.
root_text.an4.79:4.1: Idha pana, sāriputta, ekacco samaṇaṁ vā brāhmaṇaṁ vā upasaṅkamitvā pavāreti: ‘vadatu, bhante, paccayenā’ti. So yena pavāreti taṁ yathādhippāyaṁ deti.
root_text.an4.79:4.2: So ce tato cuto itthattaṁ āgacchati, so yaññadeva vaṇijjaṁ payojeti, sāssa hoti yathādhippāyā.
root_text.an4.79:5.1: Idha, sāriputta, ekacco samaṇaṁ vā brāhmaṇaṁ vā upasaṅkamitvā pavāreti: ‘vadatu, bhante, paccayenā’ti. So yena pavāreti taṁ parādhippāyaṁ deti.
root_text.an4.79:5.2: So ce tato cuto itthattaṁ āgacchati, so yaññadeva vaṇijjaṁ payojeti, sāssa hoti parādhippāyā.
root_text.an4.79:6.1: Ayaṁ kho, sāriputta, hetu ayaṁ paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā chedagāminī hoti.
root_text.an4.79:6.2: Ayaṁ pana, sāriputta, hetu ayaṁ paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā na yathādhippāyā hoti.
root_text.an4.79:6.3: Ayaṁ kho pana, sāriputta, hetu ayaṁ paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā yathādhippāyā hoti.
root_text.an4.79:6.4: Ayaṁ pana, sāriputta, hetu ayaṁ paccayo, yena midhekaccassa tādisāva vaṇijjā payuttā parādhippāyā hotī”ti.

translation_text.an4.79:1.1: Then Venerable Sāriputta went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and said to him:
translation_text.an4.79:1.2: “Sir, what is the cause, what is the reason why for different people the same kind of business undertaking might fail,
translation_text.an4.79:2.1: “Sāriputta, take a case where someone goes to an ascetic or brahmin and invites them to ask for what they need. But they fail to give what’s requested.
translation_text.an4.79:2.2: When they’ve passed away from that life, if they’re reborn in this place, whatever business they undertake fails.
translation_text.an4.79:3.1: Take a case where someone goes to an ascetic or brahmin and invites them to ask for what they need. They give what’s requested, but don’t meet expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:3.2: When they’ve passed away from that life, if they’re reborn in this place, whatever business they undertake doesn’t meet expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:4.1: Take a case where someone goes to an ascetic or brahmin and invites them to ask for what they need. They give what’s requested, meeting expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:4.2: When they’ve passed away from that life, if they’re reborn in this place, whatever business they undertake meets expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:5.1: Take a case where someone goes to an ascetic or brahmin and invites them to ask for what they need. They give what’s requested, exceeding expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:5.2: When they’ve passed away from that life, if they’re reborn in this place, whatever business they undertake exceeds expectations.
translation_text.an4.79:6.1: This is the cause, this is the reason why for different people the same kind of business undertaking might fail,
